NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT [CCP 473.5], PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SUTOWO, PRASETYO AN INDIVIDUAL HEARING SET FOR NOV-23-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT PRASETYO SUTOWO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT [CCP 473.5] IS GRANTED IN PART. THE DEFAULT IS SET ASIDE, BUT DEFENDANT IS NOT RESTORED TO POSSESSION, SO THAT ANY FURTHER PROCEEDINGS TO PROCURE DAMAGES MAY PROCEED AS A GENERAL CIVIL PROCEEDING. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: WENDY PUN, CSR # 12891 =301/PJB

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default [Ccp 473.5]
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT PRASETYO SUTOWO'S Motion To Set Aside Default [Ccp 473.5] IS GRANTED IN PART. THE DEFAULT IS SET ASIDE, BUT DEFENDANT IS NOT RESTORED TO POSSESSION, SO THAT ANY FURTHER PROCEEDINGS TO PROCURE DAMAGES MAY PROCEED AS A GENERAL CIVIL PROCEEDING. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR # 12891 =301/PJB
